amendments.text:
A limit vertical
ground reaction equal to the static load
on the tail wheel, in combination with a
side component of equal magnitude.
When a swivel is provided, the tail wheel
shall be assumed swiveled 90 degrees to
the airplane longitudinal axis, the result-
ant ground load passing through the
axle. When a lock steering device or
shimmy damper is provided, the taU
wheel shall also be assumed in the trail-
ing position with the side load acting at
the ground contact pOint. The shock
absorber and tire shall be assumed de-
flected to their static positions.
NOSE WHEELS
